chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1939 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.9604/25 3. For hearing of main case 22.05.2025 Barrister Talha Abbasi, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Pervez Ahmed Mastoi, AAG Zulfiqar Khushk, respondent No.2 is present. ----- This petition is disposed of in the light of comments filed by respondent No.2 undertaking that the expired lease or fresh leases in respect of mines and minerals would be granted to the aspirants through open auction, which will be held within a period of three months. The petition is disposed of accordingly, alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Hafiz
